transcript: The agent called the customer regarding her inquiry for a Data Science course. The customer was initially confused about the course type (web design vs. data science) and needed to consult with her family before making a decision about the course and payment.
summary: An agent from Google IIT Madras Research Park called Kanchana Parvathy to follow up on her Data Science course inquiry, explaining the course details, fees, and placement, but the customer needed to consult her family before making a decision.

sop_validation.explanation: The agent followed all standard call center script stages, including greeting, identification, stating the purpose of the call, offering solutions, and closing appropriately.
